sub_goals.description: Encode hard/soft/pair tables and recommendation lookup

verification_notes: S2.A1 spot-checks pass: hard 16 v 10 -> Hit; pair 8s v 10 -> Split; soft 18 v 9 -> Hit; pair Aces v 2 -> Split; hard 11 v 5 -> Double; hard 20 v A -> Stand. S2.A2 every (category, total/pair, dealer 2-A) cell yields a defined action label (170 hard cells + 80 soft cells + 100 pair cells = 350 cells, all populated, no undefined symbols). S2.A3 module exports only 'recommendation' (data-only + lookup); no DOM, no rendering helper, no chart-drawing function.
rationale: Wave 1 complete after this. Coordinator now unblocks section-3 (depends on 1+2).
